notes: Mic/Wi-Fi/GPU kill. Pole 1 breaks signal; Pole 2 signals GPIO state. Rear I/O bracket mount.
I2C addr 0x40 (A0=A1=GND). Channels: 12V system / solar battery / 3.3V aux.
I2C addr 0x60. Slot 0: Web3 multi-sig key. Slot 1: node TLS identity.
J1: main HAT connector to host motherboard or USB-I2C bridge.
Minimum order 5. $15 total for 5-unit run. Target OSHWA certification.
LED1: HAT power indicator.
LED2: I2C activity.
LED3: any kill-switch active.
LED4: ATECC608B heartbeat.
Decoupling: U1 VS U2 VCC J1 pins. One per IC plus bus.
Bulk decoupling on +3V3 rail.
I2C pull-ups: R_PULL_SDA R_PULL_SCL.
GPIO kill-state pull-downs (x3).
LED series resistors (x4).
R_SHUNT1 R_SHUNT2 R_SHUNT3 for INA3221.
J5: TPM 2.0 passthrough to motherboard header (DNP if ATECC608B used).
J2: one host-side one device-side (in-line switch implementation).
J3 J4: Wi-Fi and GPU enable headers.
J6 J7 J8: INA3221 shunt terminals.
D1 D2 D3: diode-OR for LED3 kill-state aggregate.
